ticket_system.panel_description:
Need pricing, want to submit inventory, or need support?

Use **Request/Submit** to generate your personal cashout sheet copy and open a private ticket. Your sheet link will also be DM'd to you for backup.

Use **Need Help?** for payout questions, onboarding help, shipping issues, or general support. Our <@&1337919015992954881> will review it and get back to you as quickly as possible.
ticket_system.footer_text: Keep your cashout sheet updated and send the completed link back in your ticket.

request_submit.intro_body: Your submission is in. A personal cashout sheet copy should appear below if Google Sheet integration is enabled. Fill it out fully using the required format, then send the completed link back in this ticket for review.

need_help.intro_body: Drop the full issue here and the cashout team will review it as soon as possible.
